title: Half a Bride
writer: Arthur Stringer, Percy Heath, Doris Anderson
actors: Esther Ralston, Gary Cooper, William Worthington
plot: Rambunctious Patience Winslow listens to a radio show about "companionae marriage" and decides to try it out, so she enters into a trial marriage. Her father, however, breaks up the marriage before it can be consummated by kidnapp...
